title: I cannot bath the baby while feeding, but the quick log shows it
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

I cannot bath the baby while feeding, but the quick log shows it. similarly there can be many other issues. Fix it.

---

**Category:** `bug` `health`
**Source:** Telegram Bot
**Status:** Pending implementation

> _This issue was created automatically via the BabyBloom Telegram Bot. No private baby data is included._
enhanced_description:
User reported that the Quick Log feature shows "Bath" as an available option even when a feeding session is currently active (in progress). This is logically incorrect — you cannot bathe a baby while feeding. The user also mentions there may be other similar cases (e.g. cannot bathe while sleeping, cannot feed while bathing, etc.).

**Component affected:** Quick Log UI (the shortcut panel that suggests common next activities)

**Expected behaviour:** The Quick Log should not show activities that are mutually exclusive with the currently active/in-progress session. For example:
- If a feeding session is active → Bath should NOT appear in quick log options
- If a bath is in progress → Feeding should NOT appear
- Similar mutual exclusions should be applied for other conflicting activity pairs

**Current behaviour:** The Quick Log shows all common activities regardless of what is currently happening, leading to logically impossible suggestions (e.g. bath while feeding).

**Edge cases to handle:**
- Multiple simultaneous active sessions (unlikely but possible in data)
- No active session → all quick log options should show as normal
- Activities that ARE compatible (e.g. can play while awake) should still appear
- Define the full set of mutually exclusive pairs: feeding↔bath, sleeping↔bath, sleeping↔feeding, etc.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Quick Log filters out activities that conflict with any currently active session
- At minimum: bath is hidden when feeding is active (and vice versa)
- Ideally: a configurable or hardcoded list of mutual exclusions is applied
- Existing quick log behavior for non-conflicting activities is unchanged

**Testing:** 
- Unit test: given an active feeding session, quick log options should not include bath
- Unit test: given an active bath session, quick log options should not include feeding
- Unit test: given an active sleep session, quick log options should not include bath or feeding
- Unit test: given no active session, all normal quick log options appear
- Regression test: verify existing quick log tests still pass after filtering logic is added
implementation_notes:
Files changed:
- src/tabs/HomeTab.tsx: Added two helper booleans (isTimerActive, isFeedingTimerActive) before the quick log item definitions. Updated `dis` fields for qlBath, qlMassage, qlSolids, qlSleepItem, and qlTummy.

Tests added:
- tests/unit/quickLogMutualExclusion.test.ts: 26 tests covering all mutual exclusion rules — Bath, Massage, Solids, Sleep/Wake Up, Tummy (tap-only and timer modes), and no-false-positive checks for Pee/Poop.

Approach:
- Bath: dis = isTimerActive || isSleeping (any active timer OR sleeping)
- Massage: dis = isTimerActive (any active timer)
- Solids: dis = isFeedingTimerActive || isSleeping (breastfeeding timer OR sleeping)
- Sleep (not Wake Up): dis = !isSleeping && isTimerActive (only disable Sleep when timer running; Wake Up always enabled)
- Tummy (tap-only): dis = isFeedingTimerActive || isSleeping
- Tummy (timer mode): dis = (feedTimer && feedTimer.type !== Tummy Time) || isSleeping

The feedTimer object only exists for timed activities: Breast L, Breast R, Tummy Time.
Formula/Bottle feeds do not start a timer, so they aren't caught by isTimerActive.
